channel.title: 正畸 on GFeather - 一个丧气满满的日苟少年

item.title: Muscle function appliance precautions
item.description: Please follow the doctor’s appointment at the time of your appointment: **If you need to change the time of the referral, or if you have any questions, you need to call 15398032510, and cooperate with the medical registration to change the appointment time. ** Language Chinese English Wearing method: ETA early correction of the wearing appliance is relatively soft, the child wears in the mouth, the upper and lower teeth

item.title: Jaw pad correction precautions
item.description: Please follow the doctor’s appointment at the time of your appointment: **If you need to change the time of the referral, or if you have any questions, you need to call 15398032510, and cooperate with the medical registration to change the appointment time. ** Language Chinese English Wearing time Wear 24 hours a day, including meals, and follow the doctor’s advice in some cases. item.title: Essix Retainer Precautions
item.description: The transparent film holder is beautiful and comfortable, but it is easy to break the tear when used improperly. Master the correct use method for to extend the life of the holder Please follow the doctor’s appointment: If you need to change the time of the referral, or if you have any questions, you need to call 15398032210, and cooperate with the medical registration to change the appointment time. Language

item.title: 透明压膜保持器注意事项

item.title: Fixed bracket considerations
item.description: Please follow the doctor’s appointment: If you need to change the time of the referral, or if you have any questions, you need to call 15398032210, and cooperate with the medical registration to change the appointment time. item.title: Invisible appliance considerations
item.description: Please follow the doctor’s appointment at the time of your appointment:If you need to change the time of the referral, or if you have any questions, you need to call 15398032510, and cooperate with the medical registration to change the appointment time. item.title: Essix Retainer从入门到放弃
item.description: 首先感谢刘文丽医生对本教程提出的指导，以及袁林天儿童口腔医院提供的场地,器械,材料。 本篇内容是因为吾负责教学指导新实习的朋友。如果要给每一个
